message:
fix(web): add effect cleanup to prevent stale state updates

Add cancellation pattern to sequence fetch effects in 4 overlays
that were missing React cleanup:
- DotPlotOverlay: also switch from OverlayEmptyState to OverlayErrorState
- PromoterOverlay
- CodonBiasOverlay
- ComplexityOverlay

This prevents React warnings about state updates on unmounted
components when overlays close during async fetch operations.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
